articles.title: Spain's Pedro Sánchez hits back at Trump threat to sever trade saying 'no to war'
articles.summary: Spain's prime minister delivers a strong rebuttal to US President Donald Trump's threat to end trade with his country.

articles.title: Greek court upholds criminal organisation verdict on neo-Nazi Golden Dawn

articles.title: Higher tariffs likely this week, says US Treasury

articles.summary: Mosiuoa Lekota was imprisoned with former South African President Nelson Mandela on Robben Island.

articles.title: Israel tells people in large parts of southern Lebanon to leave ahead of attacks

articles.summary: Markets react as the conflict in the Middle East intensifies and concerns grow over how long it will last.

articles.title: Nigerian doctors suspended over death of author Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie's son
articles.summary: The author's 21-month-old son died in January after complications during medical procedures at a private hospital in Lagos.

articles.title: Regulator contacts Meta over workers watching intimate AI glasses videos
